changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_creature_types (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_alignments (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_languages (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_sense_types (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_movement_types (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_habitats (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_treasure_tags (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_bestiary_conditions (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_monster_gear_items (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_sources (code text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text, book_code text);
